source: Atlanta Event Finder cron — 2-week couples date planner
notes: Two-week couples digest for 6/25 – 7/9/2026, prioritized through mid-July. Fresh additions this run: 4th of July Rum Punch Fest reggae rooftop (Sat 7/4), NE-YO & AKON at Lakewood (Sat 7/11), Styx & Chicago in Alpharetta (Fri 7/17), Lionel Richie & Earth Wind Fire at State Farm Arena (Sun 7/19), Jimmy Buffett's Coral Reefer Band at Chastain Park (Sat 7/18), Phillippia & Yoshi + Jessy J at Perfect Note (7/18 + 7/11), WHINE CUP free-entry dancehall at Cafe Circa (Sat 7/11), Atlanta Afro Caribbean Fest day party at Embr Lounge (Sat 7/11), Believe the Hype Saturdays at Panache ATL Marietta (ongoing Saturdays), Summer Slamajama gallery opening at Anne Irwin Fine Art (Thu 7/9–Sat 7/11), GVE Rooftop Art Gala in Midtown (7/25–7/26), ATL Vegan Festival in Piedmont Park (Sun 7/12), Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off + Elevated Vegan Tasting (Sun 7/12), Pizza for the Animals! at Pizza Verdura Sincera (Tue 7/7), four Helium Comedy specials (Na'im Lynn 7/10, Karlous Miller 7/17, Murr 7/24, Bubba Dub 7/19), HANGEO Salsa & Bachata Night (Thu 7/16), La Placita dancing under the stars (Sun 7/12), PASOFINO Dance Social (Sat 7/25), Salsa at Politan Row Colony Square (Sun 7/19), Viernes Tropicales at Sanctuary (Fri 7/3), Fresh Pasta 101 + Make Your Own Sushi cooking classes (7/17 + 7/16), Glow Nights After Hours at Georgia Aquarium (Fri 7/10), Rhythm & Roots JazzyEats supper club (Sat 7/25), Cocktails in the Garden at Atlanta Botanical Garden (Thu 7/16), Dexter Tolson jazz at Vibes Red Door (Fri 7/17), Andrew Dosunmu photography at ADAMA (Wed 7/1). Headline couples pick: Lionel Richie + Earth Wind Fire at State Farm Arena Sun 7/19 (every song is a sing-along). Comedy pick: Karlous Miller at Helium Fri/Sat 7/17–18. Afrobeat pick: Atlanta Afro Caribbean Fest day party Sat 7/11 (free til 5 with RSVP). Reggae pick: Rum Punch Fest rooftop Sat 7/4. Vegetarian pick: ATL Vegan Festival in Piedmont Park Sun 7/12. Dance pick: Salsa at Politan Row Sun 7/19 (eat + dance in one walkable spot). Calendar APIs still flaky — confirm dates/prices via the linked venue before booking.
